title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-powered enhancement to the mouse pointer that goes beyond visual indication to understand what is being pointed at and its contextual significance. The tool leverages AI to reimagine how users interact with on-screen elements across websites, documents, and workflows.
